result: Information-form (junction-tree) evolvent is EXACT (= dense RLS, keeps all coupling) at SPARSE O(d*w) storage for local measurements. kato15 5 seeds x 4 n: INFO R2 == DENSE R2 at every cell; info-matrix storage 21.6%->2.8% of dense as n 48->384 (halves per doubling). Block-diagonal (E3) trails <=0.0003 (drops separator coupling INFO keeps).

novelty_classification.note: InfoEvolventHead is a CLASSICAL primitive (information filter / Lauritzen-Spiegelhalter junction tree); NO algorithmic-novelty claim. Framework value = exact+sparse evolvent head + hypergraph<->tensor conjugation.

components_added_or_updated: BlockEvolventHead note (E4 = exact version of the E3 path)

honest_scope: sparsity is a property of the DATA (local measurements), not the head
current solve is dense O(d^3); block-tridiagonal Cholesky O(d*w^2) not yet implemented -- E4 measures STORAGE+EXACTNESS not solve-TIME

next_experiment_proposal.name: sparse block-tridiagonal Cholesky of J (solve-time win) + a non-additive cross-hyperedge target (block-vs-info discriminating test)
